qa_pairs.question: Why are users encouraged to migrate to newer releases of Linux distributions on Alliance Clouds?
qa_pairs.answer: Users are encouraged to migrate systems and platforms to newer releases to continue receiving patches and security updates, as support and updates are no longer provided for older releases.

qa_pairs.question: What is the policy for older Linux distribution images on Alliance Clouds that have passed their End of Life (EOL)?
qa_pairs.answer: Older images for Linux distributions past their End of Life (EOL) will be removed from Alliance Clouds.

qa_pairs.question: After an End of Life (EOL) Linux distribution image is removed from Alliance Clouds, can users still run existing virtual machines (VMs) with that distribution, and can they create new ones?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can continue to run an existing VM with an EOL Linux distribution. However, those EOL images will no longer be available when creating new VMs.
